repository.name: bmad-ui

labels.name: bug
labels.description: Indicates an unexpected problem or unintended behavior

labels.name: documentation
labels.description: Indicates improvements or additions to documentation

labels.name: good first issue
labels.description: Good for newcomers seeking contribution opportunities

labels.name: help wanted
labels.description: Indicates the maintainer would like community input

labels.name: question
labels.description: Indicates this issue is a question or needs discussion

labels.name: wontfix
labels.description: Indicates this will not be worked on
